scripts.bundle:tar: VER=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && mkdir -p src-tauri/target/release/bundle/tar_tmp && cp src-tauri/target/release/frontend src-tauri/target/release/bundle/tar_tmp/ && strip src-tauri/target/release/bundle/tar_tmp/frontend 2>/dev/null && cp ../java/target/parking.jar src-tauri/target/release/bundle/tar_tmp/ && cd src-tauri/target/release/bundle/tar_tmp && tar czf ../frontend-${VER}_amd64.tar.gz frontend parking.jar && cd .. && rm -rf tar_tmp && echo "Created: frontend-${VER}_amd64.tar.gz"
